title: Notification if 2 or more items have dates in the same timeline
excerpt:
Is it possible to create a notification if 2 or more items in board 1 have dates in the same timeline and the name in the mirrored employee column (from board 2) match?

posts.author: traveler (Dean Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to create a notification if 2 or more items in board 1 have dates in the same timeline and the name in the mirrored employee column (from board 2) match?

The only solution I have right now is to color code items in a Calendar view by that mirrored employee column.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dean,

Hm this is an interesting one.

In order to achieve this, I’d firstly recommend setting up a match automation to connect the items based on those matching values.

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360011393900-Cross-board-automations#match_recipes

Once these items are connected, you could set up a recipe to notify someone based on when an item is connected in the connect board column using when column changes recipe:

Does this work for you?
